name: strengthenInvariant
description: If the proof cannot proceed because the invariant is not strong enough, call this function to strengthen the invariant. Either update an exisitng invariant with the same name to add conditions, e.g. `inv1: x` becomes `inv1: x \land y`; Or add a new invariant.

node_id.description: ID of the node in the proof tree to apply this function on.
